# komodo_version (Data Source)

Reads the version of the Komodo Core API server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_version" "this" {}

output "komodo_version" {
  value = data.komodo_version.this.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The version string, used as the unique identifier for this data source.
- `version` (String) The version of the Komodo Core API.
